data.body: EPIC COMPLETE: positive-merry-hake CLOSED with certified completion-verifier signature. All 5 children closed+signed. fd84 (clippable-convulsive-eft): change 729 merged (LLM-Review+1 @01:41Z, Verified+1 @01:43Z, CI 29464320181), completion-verifier certified; both autonomous verification ACs done (guard-fire runs 29464905367 ref-guard-abort + 29464912566 lockstep-abort, all publish jobs skipped; live pypi env configured w/ required reviewer JoeOakhartNava + main-only branch policy, env-preflight exit 0). 6168 change 725 merged + certified. Epic close initially FAILed on stale session-log b151 (predated this session); resolved by recording current completion evidence comment on the epic, then closed clean. v1.0 release-readiness hardening DONE.
